drinks.refuse_message: There is nothing to drink in the cup.

drinks.actionbar: The drink tastes like fairly strong black coffee.
It tastes awful. It was not meant to be drunk.
Something seems to move in your stomach.
The liquid burns your mouth and throat.
A deeply cursed sensation strikes from behind.
The liquid seems to occupy the cup incorrectly.
You shouldn't know what this tastes like.
It tastes like apples and spice.
This is an extremely bad idea.
You feel chilled to the bone.
It cuts on the way down.
It tastes like old pirate grog.
This is medicine, not a drink.
